title: Sneak Peeks at Finders Keepers!
excerpt: Next week we will be revealing my 9th collection (what?!) with American Crafts . It might just be my favorite ever and I hope it's yours too! UPDATED: Finders Keepers is available at these fine online retailers: Simon Says Stamp…
body:
Next week we will be revealing my 9th collection (what?!) with American Crafts. It might just be my favorite ever and I hope it's yours too!

UPDATED: Finders Keepers is available at these fine online retailers: Simon Says Stamp | Blue Moon Scrapbooking | Scrapbook.com
